login_failed: Couldn't sign in. Check your email and password.
login_google_failed: Couldn't sign in with Google. Try again.
settings_staging_boundary: Staging only changes how things appear. Color stays emotion; a star's place and strength stay untouched.
universe_first_run_welcome: It's still empty. Write your first diary, and a star is born here.
test_harness_description: Temporary verification panels for Phase 1 seams and later headless units.
test_harness_panel_unavailable_descripti: This panel is registered, but one or more dependencies are not available in the current harness.
test_harness_transport_description: Calls PlatformService.Ping through the app transport context.
test_harness_auth_description: Inspects the session facade and token accessor without exposing token contents.
test_harness_query_description: Inspects TanStack Query state and seeds deterministic fake cache data.
test_harness_values_description: Shows build-time constants emitted from spec/values.yaml.
test_harness_i18n_description: Switches the active Paraglide locale and verifies panel copy updates.
mobile_diagnostics_description: Provider health for the mobile shell. No secrets or memory content.
mobile_diagnostics_unavailable: Diagnostics are disabled by the platform diagnostics surface flag.
test_harness_render_description: Skinned universe background, instanced bodies, and a bloom pass on the WebGPU renderer (WebGL2 fallback). Switch skins live.
test_harness_nebula_description: Many mood colors coexisting and bleeding — a stronger star bleeds wider. Drawn through the real palette seam, exercising the WebGL2 fallback.
test_harness_ui_gallery_description: The full button + primitive catalog across variants, sizes, and states — the surface we tune the 2D design language on.
test_harness_overlay_description: Buttons, a HUD, and a modal floating over the live 3D universe — testing 2D chrome legibility against the moving background.
test_harness_flat_description: A composed screen built entirely from 2D primitives — no 3D — to judge layout, hierarchy, and rhythm on their own.
test_harness_theme_description: Switch a universe preset (Aurora / Ember) — one control drives the 3D skin and the 2D theme together, shown over a universe+UI view and a UI-only view.
test_harness_ui_test_description: The whole design language on one surface: switch a universe preset (Aurora / Ember) to re-skin the 3D universe and every 2D component at once — universe+UI, the full component catalog, and a composed screen.
universe_nebula_notice_body: This color is the emotions you return to — not the average of what you felt, but the memories you reopen, bled into light.
writing_flow_body_placeholder: Write down what stayed with you today.
writing_flow_review_hint: Adjust the names and feelings, or say how to change them. These edits live only in this session — a star you've already sent up changes only on its own.
writing_flow_instruction_placeholder: Say how to change it — e.g. merge the meeting and lunch into one star.
writing_flow_past_date_notice: This date is ahead of your universe's present, so it's kept as a diary without lighting a star.
writing_flow_error_split: It couldn't be split. Try again.
writing_flow_error_revise: The rework didn't come through. Try again.
writing_flow_error_launch: The stars didn't rise. Nothing was saved — try again.
universe_renderer_unavailable: The 3D universe needs WebGPU, which isn't available here yet.
universe_time_sync_consent_body: To recall, the universe's time must move to today. Diaries for the past days left unwritten can no longer be added. Continue?
not_found_description: This path leads into empty space.
test_harness_sky_description: A shader-lit sphere wrapping the star scene — drag to look around inside it. Thirteen react-bits-derived effects, each sampling the universe's emotion palette; pick an effect and how many emotions it holds. Effects tagged 'adapted' re-create a look their screen-space source can't wear on a sphere.
star_detail_text_unavailable: This memory has not loaded yet.
diary_reader_recall_action: See the stars born from this diary
diary_reader_all_let_go: Every star from this diary has been let go.
diary_reader_jumping: Bringing these stars back to mind…
recall_rewrite_prompt: Write it again as you remember it now.
recall_result_reconsolidated: It is kept this way now.
twinkle_cost_diary_label: Stardust to recall this whole diary
twinkle_charge_error: That didn't go through. Try again in a moment.
twinkle_charge_pay_body: A pack is kept in your reserve.
twinkle_charge_invite_body: When a friend joins, you both receive stardust.
twinkle_write_earn_notice: Writing your diary earned you stardust.
deletion_delete_lead: This removes every star born from this diary.
deletion_delete_kept_shared: Meaning shared with other diaries stays.
deletion_delete_restore_reassurance: You can undo this within {days} days.
deletion_delete_export_reassurance: Before deleting, or while it can still be undone, you can export it as CSV or MD.
deletion_delete_permanent_after_window: After that, the original diary text is deleted for good.
deletion_delete_error: Could not delete just now. Try again in a moment.
deletion_restore_window_remaining: You can undo this within {days} days.
deletion_restore_window_today: Today is the last day you can undo this.
deletion_restore_error: Could not restore just now. Try again in a moment.
deletion_letgo_phrasing_prompt: Write the words or meaning you want to let go of.
deletion_letgo_phrasing_note: This blurs a trace a little. It is not treatment.
deletion_letgo_suggest_error: Could not find it just now. Try again in a moment.
deletion_letgo_approve_lead: Choose the meaning to let go of. Only what you choose is blurred.
deletion_letgo_approve_empty: There is no meaning used only by this memory.
deletion_letgo_kept_facts: The emotion, the time, the place, the subject, the color, and the star itself all stay.
deletion_letgo_permanence: Once you let it go, it cannot be undone.
deletion_letgo_export_reassurance: The original diary text is not deleted. You can export it as CSV or MD anytime.
deletion_letgo_seal_error: Could not let go just now. Nothing was blurred.
deletion_letgo_resource_title: If it feels too heavy to carry alone
deletion_letgo_resource_body: This app does not take the place of care. If your heart feels heavy, talking with a professional nearby can help.
deletion_letgo_resource_contact: Mental health line 1577-0199 · Suicide prevention line 109
admin_ai_key_placeholder: New key (leave blank to keep current)
admin_model_none_available: No keyed provider yet. Set a key above first.
